overview: This insect is known as a Giant Devil's Flower Mantis (Idolomantis diabolica), one of the largest species of mantises that mimics flowers. It is native to East Africa, specifically found in countries like Tanzania, Kenya, and Ethiopia. While they have an intimidating name, they are harmless to humans and are sought after as exotic pets.
